ddls:
CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the process (e.g., running, stopped, paused) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time the process started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time the process ended */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the process was updated */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator responsible for the process */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the process (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process the sensor belongs to */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor reading */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure, flow) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the sensor should be calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor within the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuators" (
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actuator */,
  "actuator_name" TEXT /* Name of the actuator */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process the actuator belongs to */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the actuator command */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the actuator */,
  "actuator_type" TEXT /* Type of actuator (e.g., valve, motor, pump) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the actuator was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the actuator was last maintained */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the actuator should be maintained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the actuator (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the actuator within the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actuator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actuators_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that generated the reading */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was taken */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor reading */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the sensor reading */,
  "anomaly_flag" INTEGER /* Anomaly flag (0 for normal, 1 for anomaly) */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who reviewed the reading (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuator_commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actuator that received the command */,
  "command_value" REAL /* Value of the actuator command */,
  "command_time" TEXT /* Time the command was sent */,
  "command_status" TEXT /* Status of the command (e.g., sent, received, executed, failed) */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who issued the command */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the command execution */,
  "anomaly_flag" INTEGER /* Anomaly flag (0 for normal, 1 for anomaly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actuator_commands_actuator_id FOREIGN KEY ("actuator_id") REFERENCES actuators ("actuator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process the algorithm controls */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of control algorithm (e.g., PID, state machine, fuzzy logic) */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Last time the algorithm was updated */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the algorithm */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator responsible for the algorithm */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the algorithm (e.g., active, inactive, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_algorithms_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)
